ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being evaluated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of evaluations conducted */,
  "factual" REAL /* Factual accuracy of the model */,
  "non_factual" REAL /* Non-factual accuracy of the model */,
  "non_factual_extrinsic" REAL /* Extrinsic non-factual accuracy */,
  "non_factual_intrinsic" REAL /* Intrinsic non-factual accuracy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "extrinsic_factuality_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of extrinsic factuality */,
  "extrinsic_entity_count" INTEGER /* Count of extrinsic entities involved in the evaluation */,
  "unknown" REAL /* Percentage of unknown outcomes */,
  "skipped" INTEGER /* Percentage of evaluations that were skipped */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Count of evaluations that failed */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being summarized */,
  "ents_per_sum" REAL /* Average entities per evaluation summary */,
  "sum_with_extrinsic" REAL /* Total score with extrinsic factors considered */,
  "sum_with_extrinsic_factual" REAL /* Total score with extrinsic factuality considered */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_summary_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the models */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "model_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_model_type" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "model_id", "access_date")
)
